title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. paucifoliatum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. paucifoliatum, also known as Lachenal's hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. paucifoliatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal benefits.
